weaknesses.challenge: Column rename without backward compatibility will break all existing queries.

weaknesses.challenge: No health check endpoint defined. The watchdog cannot monitor this service.

weaknesses.challenge: File-based locking mechanisms will break under multi-process deployment.

weaknesses.challenge: New service introduces a credential that is not covered by the rotation schedule.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing credential surface area.

weaknesses.challenge: File-based locking mechanisms will break under multi-process deployment.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing horizontal scaling barrier.

weaknesses.challenge: Primary AI provider failure has no fallback. Service will return errors during outage.
